title: Dividing decimals: hundredths
description: Divide two numbers.  Divisors, dividends, and quotients include decimals written to the tenths or hundredths place.  This exercise uses the standard algorithm to find the quotient.

hints:
$\begin{array}{rr}\\
{036.}\overline{\Big)2988.}
\end{array}$

Let's start by shifting the decimals two places values to the right. [[☃ explanation 1]]

$\begin{array}{rr}\\
{036.}\overline{\Big)\blueE2988.}
\end{array}$

How many times does $36$ go into $\blueE2$?

$\begin{array}{rr}
00\maroonE8\phantom{4.}\\
036.\overline{\Big)\blueE{298}8.}\\
\mathllap{-}\underline{\goldE{288}\phantom{0.}}\\
\purpleE{010}\phantom{0.}
\end{array}$

$\blueE{298}\div36 = \maroonE8$ with $\purpleE{10}$ left over.

$\begin{array}{rr}
00\maroonE8\phantom{4.}\\
036.\overline{\Big)\blueE{298}8.}\\
\mathllap{-}\underline{\goldE{288}{\downarrow}\phantom.}\\
\purpleE{010}8\phantom{.}
\end{array}$

Now, we need to bring down the $\blueE8$ from the ones place to get our new dividend of $\blueE{108}$.

$\begin{array}{rr}
00\maroonE8\phantom{4.}\\
036.\overline{\Big)2988.}\\
\mathllap{-}\underline{\goldE{288}{\downarrow}\phantom.}\\
\blueE{0108}{\phantom.}
\end{array}$

How many times does $36$ go into $\blueE{108}$?

$\begin{array}{rr}
008\maroonE3\phantom.\\
036.\overline{\Big)2988.}\\
\mathllap{-}\underline{\goldE{288}{\downarrow}}\phantom.\\
\blueE{0108}\phantom.\\
-\underline{0108{\phantom.}}\\
\phantom{000}0{\phantom.}
\end{array}$

$\blueE{108}\div36 = \maroonE3$.

Now, we need to bring down the $\blueE8$ from the ones place to get our new dividend of $\blueE{48}$.

\mathllap{-}\underline{\goldE{192}{\downarrow}\phantom.}\\

How many times does $24$ go into $\blueE{48}$?

008\maroonE2\phantom.\\

\blueE{0048}\phantom.\\
